nasb.text: Shepherds and their flocks will come to her, They will pitch their tents around her, They will pasture each in his place.

esv.text: Shepherds with their flocks shall come against her; they shall pitch their tents around her; they shall pasture, each in his place.

cnv.text: 牧人必帶著他們的羊群， 來到錫安那裡， 在城的四圍支搭帳棚， 各在自己的地方分別牧放羊群。”

ccb.text: 敌人必围攻她， 在她周围安营扎寨， 如同牧人带着羊群在她四周搭起帐篷。
